assertionResults.observation: Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: The review distinguishes composition fee and protocol share from gas, price movement, slippage, and unplaced assets.

The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Estimated fees use the pinned active-bin state and exact proposed distribution.

Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation. Public issue #31 records PR #41 exact head 546c89780d9396df6dae3b28173b7fe98e0515f4 with SDK 32/32, receipt, attestation, and journal checks plus browser-to-Anvil 4/4; PR #50 run 29184758002 provides later all-green cumulative validation.
